Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 51 

MDCD_MDCLY_NDY_CVRG_ABD_POP_IND 

LABEL: Eligible Population Indicator: Medicaid Medically Needy Coverage Aged-Blind-Disabled — Ever in 
Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates if the managed care entity is authorized to enroll the medically needy A/B/D eligibility 
groups; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MDCD_MDCLY_NDY_CVRG_ABD_POP_IND 

LONG NAME: MDCD_MDCLY_NDY_CVRG_ABD_POP_IND
